calendar.matters:
COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-12-2022 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being assigned from Department 206 for commencement of court trial.

Plaintiff Bank of America, N.A. represented by Carina Jordan, Esq.
Defendant Michael Hau not appearing.

Dept. 514; Judge: Murlene J. Randle; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Bailiff: Deputies Park and Choi; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:15:40 a.m. and concluding at 10:35:30 a.m.

BRUCE W. VAN KLEECK (Operations Consultant, Assistant Vice President/Custodian of Records) is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff under direct examination.

The following exhibit is MARKED/ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE:

Plaintiff's Exhibit No. 1 - Copies of Monthly Billing Statements

The matter is submitted. The Court briefly examines the witness.
Court finds in favor of Plaintiff and makes the following award:

Principal: $5,987.73
Costs: $294.50

Toal Judgment: $6,282.23

Proposed judgment signed and filed this date.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-29-2022 Assigned To Trial Court

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-12-2022 Set For Trial On Aug-29-22 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
